article.title: SoftBank Group Prices ¥418 Billion Retail Bonds at Record 4.97%
article.summary: SoftBank Group Corp. priced yen hybrid bonds targeting retail investors at an initial five-year coupon of 4.97%, marking the highest level for such debt issued by the company.
article.title_zh: SoftBank Group 以創紀錄的4.97%利率向零售債券定價418億日圓
article.summary_zh: SoftBank Group Corp.向零售投資者發行日圓混合債券,初始五年票息為4.97%,創下該公司此類債務的最高水準。

article.title: Nvidia’s Huang Urges Companies to Put AI Breakthroughs Before Profit
article.summary: Leading booster for AI says companies are too focused on an immediate payoff
article.title_zh: Nvidia 黃仁勳敦促企業將 AI 突破置於利潤之前
article.summary_zh: AI 領域的主要倡導者表示，企業過於關注短期回報。

article.title: Stalking victim sues OpenAI, claims ChatGPT fueled her abuser’s delusions and ignored her warnings
article.summary: OpenAI ignored three warnings that a ChatGPT user was dangerous — including its own mass casualty flag — while he stalked and harassed his ex-girlfriend, a new lawsuit alleges.
article.title_zh: 騷擾受害者控告 OpenAI，聲稱 ChatGPT 助長施虐者的妄想並忽視其警告
article.summary_zh: 一份新訴訟指控 OpenAI 忽視了三次關於 ChatGPT 用戶危險性的警告（包括其自身的大規模傷亡標記），而該用戶對前女友進行跟蹤和騷擾。

article.title: Blackstone Eyes $2 Billion IPO for Data Center Acquisition Firm
article.summary: Blackstone Inc. is considering an initial public offering that could raise $2 billion for an acquisition company that will snap up data centers, according to people familiar with the matter.
article.title_zh: Blackstone 計畫為數據中心收購公司籌資 20 億美元 IPO
article.summary_zh: 根據知情人士表示,Blackstone Inc. 正考慮進行首次公開募股,該公司將為一家收購數據中心的收購公司籌集 20 億美元。

article.title: Anthropic temporarily banned OpenClaw’s creator from accessing Claude
article.summary: This ban took place after Claude's pricing changed for OpenClaw users last week.
article.title_zh: Anthropic 暫時禁止 OpenClaw 創作者訪問 Claude
article.summary_zh: 此禁令是在上週 Claude 針對 OpenClaw 用戶更改定價後實施的。

article.title: OpenAI Adds New $100/Month ChatGPT Subscription Tier for Heavier Codex Use
article.summary: OpenAI today added a new subscription tier , which the company says is meant to support increasing Codex use. Codex is OpenAI's AI coding agent that's integrated into ChatGPT, and it competes with Anthropic's Claude Code. The new $100/month Pro tier provides 5x more Codex usage than the $20/month ChatGPT Plus plan. OpenAI says that it is best for longer, high-effort Codex sessions. ChatGPT also has a $200 Pro tier with a 20x higher usage allowance, and the $100/month plan is a new middle-tier option. Both the $100 and $200 plans share the "Pro" name. Pro subscribers will have access to all Pro features, including the Pro model and unlimited access to Instant and Thinking models. To celebrate the launch of the new plan, OpenAI is increasing Codex usage for a limited
article.title_zh: OpenAI 推出新的 $100/月 ChatGPT 訂閱方案以支援更高的 Codex 使用量
article.summary_zh: OpenAI 推出新訂閱層級，旨在支援 Codex 的增長使用，Codex 是 OpenAI 整合至 ChatGPT 的 AI 編碼代理，與 Anthropic 的 Claude Code 競爭。

article.title: The Magic of Agentic AI Will Come From a Holistic Approach to Chip Design
article.summary: Agentic AI is all the rage today, and even more so within the EDA environment, with both the top companies as well as emerging startups talking about how agentic AI will solve all the problems of designing
article.title_zh: Agentic AI 的魔力將來自於整體晶片設計方法
article.summary_zh: Agentic AI 目前熱門非凡，尤其在 EDA 環境中備受關注，業界頂級公司和新興新創企業都在探討 Agentic AI 如何解決晶片設計的各項問題。

article.title: Google AI Mode getting ‘plus’ redesign as agentic booking expands globally
article.summary: Like the Gemini app , Google AI Mode is also seeing a redesign of its prompt box, while the tool can now book restaurants for users internationally. more…
article.title_zh: Google AI Mode 推出「Plus」重新設計，智能預訂功能全球擴展
article.summary_zh: Google AI Mode 正進行提示框重新設計，同時該工具現已支援全球範圍內的餐廳預訂功能。

article.title: What leaked "SteamGPT" files could mean for the PC gaming platform's use of AI
article.summary: These days, it seems like every tech company and their corporate parent is looking to squeeze AI tools and features into their products, whether they're wanted or not. So when files with names and functions referencing a "SteamGPT" appeared in a recent Steam client update, Valve watchers took quick notice . From the outside, it's hard to tell precisely what form any such "SteamGPT" would take. But looking through variable names and references in the files themselves suggests that Valve may be looking to use AI tools to streamline internal evaluations of in-game incidents and sift through potentially suspicious accounts. Looking at the variables As tracked by the automated SteamTracking GitHub project , the term "SteamGPT" appears multiple times in three separate files added in the April 7
article.title_zh: 洩露的「SteamGPT」檔案揭示 Steam 平台可能如何使用 AI
article.summary_zh: 最近 Steam 客戶端更新中出現的「SteamGPT」檔案引發 Valve 觀察者的關注，預示該遊戲平台可能整合 AI 功能。

article.title: Google Wallet’s big redesign starts rolling out and your favorites just got easier to reach
article.summary: Credit: Edgar Cervantes / Android Authority TL;DR Google has just started rolling out a new interface for the Wallet app. The updated interface emphasizes better visibility for favorites. In addition to a new home screen for the app, Google Wallet also gets a refreshed design for individual cards and passes. For the past few months, Google has been testing a few key interface upgrades for the Wallet app to make important or most frequently used passes easier to access. While we’ve brought you early previews of these features from tinkering with the app internally, Google is now officially rolling out these visual upgrades. Following its upgrade to version 26.14.895964528, the Google Wallet app is switching to a grid layout for the home page. The new design arranges favorites in a more pala
article.title_zh: Google Wallet 重大改版開始推出，你的最愛現在更容易存取
article.summary_zh: Google 開始推出新的 Wallet 應用程式介面，更新的介面強調更好的最愛項目可見性。除了新的應用主畫面，Google Wallet 還為個別卡片提供了改進的設計。

article.title: Some Google Pixel phones hit with bootloop issues following recent updates, fix in the works
article.summary: Following some of their latest updates, a number of Google Pixel owners are reporting bootloop issues, with Google “working to identify a fix.” more…
article.title_zh: 部分 Google Pixel 手機在最近更新後出現啟動循環問題，修復方案進行中
article.summary_zh: 多名 Google Pixel 用戶在更新後報告啟動循環問題，Google 正在努力識別並推出修復方案。

article.title: AI Mode in Google Search now helps you book restaurants in the UK
article.summary: AI Mode in Google Search has received another new feature in the UK, following its initial rollout in the US last year. It can now book restaurants for you. You just need to describe what you're looking for, and list all of your needs and preferences. Google uses "find a table for two at a dog-friendly Italian restaurant in Shoreditch for Saturday at 7PM" as an example in the post announcing the new feature. There's also "find me a sushi restaurant nearby that has a table for four that also serves vegan tempura". You get the idea. AI Mode will show you a curated list of places to...
article.title_zh: Google Search 中的 AI Mode 現已支援在英國預訂餐廳
article.summary_zh: Google Search 的 AI Mode 在英國推出了新功能，可協助用戶預訂餐廳。用戶只需描述需求和偏好，Google 即可為您找到合適的餐廳。

article.title: Report: Apple tops global smartphone market for first time in Q1 as overall shipments drop
article.summary: Counterpoint Research has published its latest report on global smartphone shipments for Q1 2026, showing that strong demand for the iPhone 17 helped Apple take the top spot in the market for the first time in a first quarter. Here are the details. more…
article.title_zh: 報告：Apple 在 Q1 首次登頂全球智慧型手機市場，整體出貨量下降
article.summary_zh: Counterpoint Research 發布 Q1 2026 全球智慧型手機出貨量報告，顯示 iPhone 17 的強勁需求幫助 Apple 首次在第一季度佔據市場第一名。

article.title: Nvidia’s AI grid and the telco dilemma
article.summary: Should telcos invest billions in edge GPU infrastructure or wait for physical AI use cases to mature? In sum – what we know: ABI Research recently put out an analysis looking at Nvidia’s AI grid concept and the bigger question…
article.title_zh: Nvidia 的 AI 網格與電信運營商的困境
article.summary_zh: 電信運營商應該投資數十億美元建設邊緣 GPU 基礎設施，還是等待 Physical AI 使用案例成熟？ABI Research 最近發布了一份分析，探討 Nvidia 的 AI 網格概念及其更廣泛的意義。

article.title: Japan Bets $16 Billion to Propel Startup Rapidus Into AI Chips
article.summary: Japan approved ¥631.5 billion ($4 billion) in additional subsidies to quicken Rapidus Corp. into the intensely competitive AI chipmaking arena, ramping up financial support for a signature project widely regarded as a long shot.
article.title_zh: 日本投入160億美元 推動新創公司Rapidus進軍AI晶片領域
article.summary_zh: 日本批准向Rapidus Corp.提供6,315億日圓（40億美元）的額外補助金，以加速其進入競爭激烈的AI晶片製造市場，這是該標誌性項目的重大資金支持，該項目普遍被視為風險較高的賭注。
